title: rachab #7337
definition:
1) to be or grow wide, be or grow large
    1a) (Qal) to be widened, be enlarged
    1b) (Niphal) broad or roomy pasture (participle)
    1c) (Hiphil)
        1c1) to make large
        1c2) to enlarge
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to be or grow wide, be or grow large
    1a) (Qal) to be widened, be enlarged
    1b) (Niphal) broad or roomy pasture (participle)
    1c) (Hiphil)
        1c1) to make large
        1c2) to enlarge

    NASB:  to be or grow wide or large
